heading: Step 2: Create the environment file.
body:
Create a `.env` file in your project root and add your API keys and connection string:

```env
OPENAI_API_KEY = "<openai-api-key>"
MONGODB_URI = "<connection-string>"
VOYAGEAI_API_KEY = "<voyage-api-key>"
```

Replace `<connection-string>` with the connection string for your
Atlas cluster or local Atlas deployment.

Atlas Cluster

Local or Self-Managed

*Duration: 30 Minutes*

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qXDrWKVSx1w](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qXDrWKVSx1w)
